step1.title: Describe your parcel
step1.subtitle: Accuracy and photos protect everyone
step1.deliveryBlockTitle: The recipient picks up the parcel

goldenRules.title: Golden rules for a smooth shipment
goldenRules.pack: **Pack carefully.** Sturdy bag or box, bubble wrap if fragile, properly taped.
goldenRules.weigh: **Weigh precisely.** Declared weight must match actual weight at handover.
goldenRules.describe: **Describe accurately.** {carrierFirstName} will inspect the content before accepting.

parcelDetails.declaredValueTooltip: The declared value sets the compensation ceiling in case of dispute. Enter the purchase price of the content.

photos.label: Parcel photos
photos.hint: Ideally: one photo of unpacked content + one of the packed parcel. JPEG or PNG, max 10 MB per photo.

basic.title: Basic protection
basic.description: You''re covered against non-delivery. Payment is held until the parcel reaches the recipient.

extended.title: Insurance up to €500
extended.description: Loss, theft, damage during transport. Partial theft of content covered.

step2.title: Who is the recipient?
step2.subtitle: The recipient doesn''t need a Yamba account. You''ll share the code with them.

deliveryFlow.title: How the delivery will work
deliveryFlow.codeGiven: **A 6-digit code** will be given to you after payment.
deliveryFlow.shareIt: **You share it** with the recipient by SMS, WhatsApp or in person.
deliveryFlow.handToTraveler: **They give it to the tripper** at delivery. Without this code, the parcel cannot be released.

form.phoneHint: Used to send the code via SMS / WhatsApp
form.emailHint: To notify the recipient when the parcel arrives

step3.title: Your commitment
step3.subtitle: You certify on your honor the content of the parcel

handoverFlow.title: What will happen when you hand over the parcel
handoverFlow.visualInspection: **Mandatory visual inspection.** The tripper will examine your parcel before accepting — don''t be surprised.
handoverFlow.refusalPossible: **Refusal possible if non-compliant.** If the content differs from your declaration, the tripper can refuse. You''ll be refunded but the trip is lost.
handoverFlow.crossPhotos: **Cross-referenced photos.** The tripper will take their own photos as evidence in case of dispute.

charter.title: Shipper Charter
charter.subtitle: Legal commitment — read carefully
charter.intro: By confirming this deal, I declare and guarantee on my honor that my parcel:
charter.noIllicit: contains **no illicit**, dangerous or prohibited products
charter.matchDeclared: matches exactly the **declared category, weight and content**
charter.customsCompliant: complies with the **customs regulations** of the destination country
charter.disclaimer: Any false declaration engages my sole civil and criminal liability, to the exclusion of the tripper and Yamba.
charter.fullLink: See the full charter and prohibited items

accept.title: I accept the Shipper Charter
accept.descPrefix: I have also read and accept the

step4.title: Payment
step4.subtitle: You''re only charged when the tripper accepts (within 24h max)

card.title: Card
card.description: Visa, Mastercard, Amex · International cards accepted

applePay.title: Apple Pay
applePay.description: Touch ID or Face ID · no card entry

googlePay.title: Google Pay
googlePay.description: One-click payment from your Google account

afterPayment.title: After your payment
afterPayment.step1: The tripper receives your request and has **24h to accept**. You''re only charged on acceptance.
afterPayment.step2: You receive your **6-digit code**, to share with the recipient.
afterPayment.step3: Meet the tripper for the **handover**, where they''ll inspect and photograph the parcel.
afterPayment.step4: The recipient gives the code to the tripper at arrival, who enters it to confirm delivery.
afterPayment.step5: **3 days after** confirmed delivery, the tripper receives their payment.

step4.trustStripe: Payment secured by Stripe. Yamba never stores your card details.

summary.totalNoteLong: The amount is authorized now and only charged when the tripper accepts.
summary.ctaHint: You''re only charged when the tripper accepts
